strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js, TypeScript, and React matching the primary stack
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching AI agent requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and database experience (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed in skills; only Java mentioned briefly for robotic arms work years ago
Vitest not explicitly mentioned, though general testing framework expertise is implied through TDD practice

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at current role

response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ year full-stack requirement with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience (Optilyz, RIDE, WatchUp) and directly relevant AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq, which matches a required skill. Database (MongoDB, MySQL), Docker/Kubernetes (GISCollective deployment), and Git proficiency are evidenced. Gaps exist around Nest.js and Kotlin, which are not cited anywhere in the resume, and Vitest is not named explicitly though TDD discipline is well documented. Strong craftsmanship signals (TDD workshops, Refactoring Dojos, open-source maintenance) suggest the framework gaps are learnable.
